title: stenotus pulvinatus
intro: Stenotus pulvinatus, also known as Mountain Sneezeweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function, making it a valuable remedy for individuals suffering from respiratory conditions. Herbal preparations of Stenotus pulvinatus typically involve drying and infusing the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water to create teas or infusions, which can be used to soothe respiratory issues.
